

1. Let's design a different modal for this. This somehow looks like hakibets . We can come up with one that identifies with 7bet.  
   ![][image1]

     
2. Lets update the code center page. Should be unique. Should not look like hakibet’s bethub.  
   ![][image2]

3. Virtuals: Update Hakibets related icons to 7bet icons.  
   ![][image3]

4. Remove anything that ties the application/system to Lenstech.  
   ![][image4]

5. Privacy policy . Remove anything that ties the application/system to hakibets and lenstech.  
   ![][image5]

6. Terms and Conditions) Remove anything that ties the application/system to hakibets and lenstech.  
   ![][image6]

7. Redesign casino home. Should not be the same as hakibets. We can play with the colors.
